title: EndpointType not re-exported from lib.rs
description: lib.rs re-exports ChatStreamDataType, PushUrgency, and QuotaScope at the crate root (line 32), but EndpointType is absent despite appearing in two public struct fields: Endpoint::endpoint_type and MessageAction::action_type. Any caller that pattern-matches on those fields must write types::EndpointType or import it explicitly — it is not reachable from the crate root. ChatStreamDataType is re-exported even though it only appears inside ChatStreamEnable (a less commonly matched type), making the omission of EndpointType inconsistent. Fix: add EndpointType to the re-export line in lib.rs.
